title: Raa Raa Sarasaku Lyrics Chandramukhi
stanzas: <div>Raa Raa Sarasaku Song Lyrics From Chandramukhi

raa raa sarasaku rara
raa raa chinthaku chera
praname needhiraa aelukoradora
swaasalo swaasavai raa raa

nee pondu nekkori abhisarikai nenu
vechaanu sumanohara
kaalana marugaina ananda raagalu
vinipincha nilichanuraa

vayasu jaalamo pa ledura
marulugounna chinna dhaani raa
tanuvu baadha teercha
raavera raavera

sala sala ragilina
paruvapu soda idi
tadi budi tadi budi
tapanala swaramidi
ra ra ra ra  ra ra ra ra

ye banthamo
idhi ye bandhamo
ye janma bandhaala sumaganthamo

ye swapnamo
 idhi ye swapnamo
nayanala naaayadhu
toli swapnamo

virahapu vyadhalanu vinava
ee tadabadhu tanuvunu kanava
maguvala manasulu telisi
nee valapunu marachute suluvaa

idi kani vini eruganu valapula kalayika
sarasaku pilichiti nirasana tagadika
jigi bigi jigi bigi sogasula moravini
mila mila magasiri merupula meriyaga
ra ra ra ra ra ra

laka laka laka laka
thaam tharigida dheem tharigida
dhoam tharigida nam tharigida

thatha tharigida dhithi tharigida
thoam thoam tharigida
nam nam tharigida

thaa dhee dhoam nam cham cham
thaa dhee dhoam nam cham cham
thakita dhikita thomkita namkita
thaka thaka dhina thaka
thatha thalaangu thoam thatha
thalaangu thoam
thagadhi thalaangu thoam
thalaangu thaka jam
thadheemtha naka jam
thalaangu thaka jam
thadheemtha naka jam
thalaangu thaka jam
thadheemtha naka jam

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Raa Raa Sarasaku'?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, celebrating the joy and beauty of romantic relationships.

How does 'Raa Raa Sarasaku' fit into the plot of Chandramukhi?

This song is a pivotal moment in the film, showcasing the blossoming romance between the lead characters amidst a backdrop of supernatural elements.

Who are the singers of 'Raa Raa Sarasaku'?

The song features the talented voices of Binni Krishnakumar and Tipu.

Who composed the music for 'Raa Raa Sarasaku'?

The music was composed by Vidyasagar, known for his melodious and catchy tunes.

When was 'Raa Raa Sarasaku' released?

The song was released on April 14, 2005.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Raa Raa Sarasaku, the vibrant melodies and lively beats encapsulate the joy of love, making it a standout track in Chandramukhi. The song beautifully portrays the emotions of romance and celebration, resonating with listeners through its catchy rhythm and heartfelt lyrics. As the characters express their affection, the music elevates the mood, creating an unforgettable experience. This duet not only showcases the talents of its singers but also highlights the exceptional composition by Vidyasagar, making it a timeless favorite.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Raa Raa Sarasaku from Chandramukhi is a vibrant celebration of love that perfectly captures the essence of romance. With the enchanting vocals of Binni Krishnakumar and Tipu, combined with Vidyasagar's captivating composition, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Dive into the melodious journey that intertwines heartfelt lyrics with an upbeat rhythm, making it a must-listen for any occasion.
stanzaMeanings: Raa Raa Sarasaku Song Lyrics From Chandramukhi
Raa raa sarasaku, rara raa raa, think about it, your breath is here, come to me, in your breath, raa raa.
You are the one I cherish, I have kept you close, beautiful moments echo in my heart, they shine brightly.
Is age just a trap? Little things are fading away, let go of the pain, come on, come on.
The season is here, this is the time, let it flow, let it flow, the sound is here, ra ra ra ra ra ra ra ra.
What kind of bond is this? What kind of relationship is this? Is it a bond from this life?
What kind of dream is this? What kind of dream is this? My eyes are leading me to the first dream.
Listen to the pain of separation, this body is a burden, understand the hearts of the girls, will you forget your love?
This is not just a sight, it is a call of love, it is a celebration of joy, ra ra ra ra ra ra.
Laka laka laka laka, let it flow, let it flow, let it flow, let it flow, let it flow.
Thatha let it flow, dhithi let it flow, let it flow, let it flow, let it flow, let it flow.

Thaa dhee dhoam, we shine, thaa dhee dhoam, we shine, thakita dhikita, let it flow, let it flow, let it flow, let it flow, let it flow, let it flow, let it flow, let it flow, let it flow, let it flow.
